summary: Iteration 116 - Nexus AI Budget Controls Testing Complete. All 15 backend API tests passed (3 org tests skipped due to no org admin membership). Frontend UI verified: Budget Center, Platform Panel, Workspace Panel all visible with 58 provider budget rows, 2 save buttons, warn/hardcap inputs working.

issues: Minor hydration warnings in console for span/option/select elements - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Nexus AI Budget Controls fully tested: 1) Platform budget APIs (GET/PUT /api/admin/managed-keys/budgets, GET /api/admin/managed-keys/dashboard) working. 2) Workspace budget APIs (GET/PUT /api/workspaces/{id}/nexus-ai/budgets, GET /api/workspaces/{id}/nexus-ai/dashboard) working. 3) Budget validation (warn > cap rejected, negative values rejected). 4) GitHub integration endpoints accessible with budget tracking. 5) UI shows Budget Center with Platform and Workspace panels, 29 providers each with warn/hardcap inputs and enabled checkboxes. 6) Org budget APIs skipped (test user has no org admin membership).

platform_dashboard_api.details: GET /api/admin/managed-keys/dashboard returns scope_type=platform, month_key, total_cost_usd, providers

workspace_dashboard_api.details: GET /api/workspaces/{id}/nexus-ai/dashboard returns scope_type=workspace, month_key, total_cost_usd, providers

budget_validation.details: warn_threshold > hard_cap returns 422, negative values return 422

budget_hierarchy.details: Workspace budget overrides platform budget correctly

github_integration.details: GitHub pull/push endpoints accessible with budget tracking integrated

nexus_ai_ui.details: Settings > Nexus AI tab loads Budget Center with Platform and Workspace panels, 58 provider rows, save buttons, warn/hardcap inputs

managed_keys_settings.details: GET /api/settings/managed-keys returns providers with available/opted_in/eligible/type fields

credits_api.details: GET /api/settings/managed-keys/credits returns credits_total, credits_used, credits_remaining, plan
